name: PER_KEYWORDS_DYN_GT
description: Global Temporary table to store dynamically calculated keywords during crawling with all people option.

columns.Name: PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: This column stores the Person Identifier.

columns.Name: LANGUAGE_CODE
columns.Comments: Indicates the code of the language code into which the contents of the translatable columns are used

columns.Name: DYN_XML_KEYWORDS
columns.Comments: This is a XML CLOB object to store dynamic keywords info about the person to be used in Oracle Text queries.

columns.Name: DATE_CAL
columns.Comments: Date used for the dynamic keywords clob calculation.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
